weakest: Section 6 Exclusions uses vague, non-standard phrasing ('reasonably understands was already known', 'becomes available from any source', 'can be used in Recipient's ordinary business without reference') that undermines clarity and professional register.
Section 3 uses the undefined term 'Representatives', creating structural incoherence and ambiguity.
Section 8 Return or Destruction carves out 'ordinary business recordkeeping' without defining scope or continuing obligations, creating internal tension with the obligation to return or destroy.
